name: Gemma 4 26B A4B
description: Gemma 4 26B A4B is built for developers who need scalable performance without sacrificing core capabilities.Crucially, it retains the massive 256K-token context window of the 31B model, making it highly competitive for long-context RAG and processing extensive, image-rich document datasets.
